Name: Active
Description: Indicates whether a unit is in use

Name: Main
Description: Indicates the main unit per division. Will be used when creating new item

Name: TimeUnit
Description: If Type = 'T' (time) then this fields indicates the type of time frame. yy = Year, mm = Month, wk = Week, dd = Day, hh = Hour, mi = Minute, ss = Second

Name: Type
Description: Type of unit. Type 'Time' is especially important for contracts.
